title: Growing bacteria in b-broth
author: Cristian Riccio

steps_raw.instruction: Find an isolated colony of bacteria on the agar plate.
At the Bunsen burner, touch the colony with the tip of a pipette tip and drop the pipette tip into a 100 ml bottle of b-broth.
Put the 100 ml bottle of b-broth with the bacteria in the incubator, 37 C for E. coli .
